Interface IRasterPyramid2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control the pyramids for a raster dataset.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("F4E73742-71C1-425E-B889-E4FAD1EA63D0")]
public interface IRasterPyramid2 : IRasterPyramid
